new_risk_factors: Foreign currency headwind language removed — its absence from new_language may indicate it is no longer a notable drag, but its prior prominence is now gone without explicit confirmation
Removed caveat on revenue mix variability ('Company-owned store and franchised store revenues may vary from period to period') — previously flagged as a volatility risk
Removed explicit mention of advertising incentive drag ('decrease in advertising incentives related to certain brand promotions') — no replacement qualifier added
positive_catalysts_cited: Launch of Parmesan Stuffed Crust in the U.S. driving U.S. same store sales via both higher transaction counts AND higher average ticket
Income from operations increased 7.0% (two fiscal quarters)
International same store sales driven by higher customer transaction counts in both Q2 and two-quarter period
key_quotes: same store sales in the second quarter of 2025 was driven by higher customer transaction counts and an increase in average ticket, each driven in part by the launch of our Parmesan Stuffed Crust in the U.S
same store sales was driven by lower customer transaction counts, partially offset by an increase in average ticket
payload.mda_summary: The delta reveals a sharp reversal in operating momentum: income from operations flipped from a -0.2% decline to +14.8% growth, while the U.S. same store sales narrative shifted from lower transaction counts to simultaneously higher transaction counts AND higher average ticket — both attributed to the Parmesan Stuffed Crust launch. Analysts may be underweighting the dual-driver quality of the U.S. comp (volume + ticket together is more durable than ticket-only) and the removal of cost-volatility and FX headwind language that previously populated the MD&A. The disappearance of explicit supply chain pricing disclosure (4.8% basket inflation) and advertising incentive drag language suggests both tailwinds have either normalized or become less prominent, which could imply margin relief that is not fully priced into current estimates.
